scope: final pre-commit hardening of the audit-cache local-build content digest
changes: hash lake-manifest.json and lean-toolchain as raw bytes instead of replacement-decoded text
distinguish FileNotFoundError from permission/stat failures for metadata and build directories
replace suppressing exists/is_dir/is_file probes by explicit stat checks
assign a fresh cache-bypass nonce after unreadable metadata, artifact, or stat failures
retain the stable unspecified-workdir legacy lane but exclude it from hard U' ObservationFrameId use

tests.command: python -m pytest -q tests/test_uprime_k0_foundations.py tests/test_v92_audit_cache_build_state_fingerprint.py tests/test_v65_audit_cache_pruning.py tests/test_v85_cache_lane_and_coverage.py tests/test_v74_test_tier_manifest.py

non_claims: the stable unspecified-workdir lane is legacy-only and not a hard U' frame
TOCTOU between fingerprint acquisition and Lean execution remains unclosed
no later empirical or GPU stage is licensed
